_publications._publicationTitle: Stem-like cells drive NF1-associated MPNST functional heterogeneity and tumor progression.

_contextSnippet: Spontaneous Nes-TK;cisNP MPNST were found to contain approximately 3% GFP+ cells and as for the Nes-TK;SKP model, KI67+ or BrdU incorporating tumor cells were seldom GFP positive
details: Spontaneous Nes-TK;cisNP MPNST contained approximately 3% GFP+ cells with low cycling frequency
